title: [SampleFDO] Check pseudo probe descriptors for unused profile in stale profile matching
author: apolloww
description:
If a function is fully optimized away in pre-link, it won't show up in `SymbolMap` in post-link and the check of unused profile would treat it as unused and allow it to be matched with unrelated functions. Extend the check to cover such case in post link.
 
Also make `FuncToProfileNameMap` an ordered map so that we always get the same iterator sequence out of it in `UpdateWithSalvagedProfiles`.
